steps.title: Spot the defining context
steps.content: Trofimov says he has "undergone a great deal" and immediately lists: hunger, illness, being shaken, and being tossed everywhere by fate. That list defines what the phrase means.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
The word needs to mean gone through or endured. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Uncovered.: discovered something hidden — Trofimov is not revealing new information; he is describing things that happened to him personally. ✗
  • Choice B — Overlooked.: failed to notice — the opposite of what the passage says; Trofimov is acutely aware of his hardships, not ignoring them. ✗
  • Choice C — Experienced.: gone through, lived through — matches Trofimov listing everything he has personally endured: hunger, illness, displacement. ✓
  • Choice D — Related.: narrated or told — Trofimov is describing what happened to him, not stories he told others. ✗
That is the correct answer.
